productDisplayName: Vero Moda Women Viva Yellow Top
description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Yellow top, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic floral print on the right side. Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash in cold water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
